interpretation: The routing model reframes how intelligence compounds. Most people try to accumulate knowledge (the payload). The leverage is in improving the routing system: better data, faster feedback, corrected reps, and analogy transfer. This framework unifies why the same person can be elite in one domain and average in another — same payload, different routing infrastructure.
lesson: Data turns vague feeling into measurable signal. Without data you say 'I feel stronger.' With data you know Exercise A produced 0.18 inches, Exercise B 0.05. Without data you say 'sales are down.' With data you know repeat customers fell from 41% to 23%. Data gives the map. Feedback updates the map. Reps train the driver. Intelligence is how well you route.
next_step: Save to SQLite memory, link related entries, then track the returned action/result.
pattern: Intelligence = routing quality, not knowledge volume. The same formula applies across all domains: data shows what changed, feedback updates the map, reps train the operator, and analogy bridges known routes into unknown domains. Polymath capability is not breadth of knowledge — it is depth of routing transferability.
pull_trigger: routing, intelligence, analogy, polymath, framework, bottleneck, plateau

signal: Intelligence is not knowing more — it is routing better. Formula: Raw ability + data + feedback + corrected reps + analogy + action = routing intelligence. This applies uniformly across work, finance, fitness, network troubleshooting, career, AI, and business.
